reasoning: The fraud alert indicates this customer has 9 refunds in 35 days with identical 'item not received' claims despite confirmed deliveries, totaling $1,588.19 refunded (82% refund rate). Although the current claim cites 'package crushed', the pattern of fraudulent behavior and explicit system warning 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately' requires escalation rather than direct approval/denial.
